title: plan-change.reviewed payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a super-admin reviews (approves/rejects) a plan-change request. Producer: tenant-service (apps/tenant-service/src/routes/plan-changes.ts). IMPORTANT: the REAL payload does NOT match the typed PlanChangeReviewedPayloadSchema in packages/contracts (which lists status/decisionNote/reviewedByUserId). The actual publish sends action/toPlan/paymentMethod/requiresStripePayment/note/requestedByUserId/reviewedByUserId. Documented from the real call site. No subscriber consumes this subject today (honest gap).

action.description: Review action, e.g. APPROVE / REJECT (as sent by the review route body).

paymentMethod.description: Resolved payment method (e.g. STRIPE), or null.

requiresStripePayment.description: True when the approval still needs a Stripe payment before activation.
